headline: How The Datadog (DDOG) Story Is Shifting With AI Demand And Valuation Debates
summary: Datadog’s updated fair value estimate has moved from US$181.52 to US$225.76 per share, a shift that puts a fresh spotlight on where analysts think the stock should trade. Behind that new target, research views are split, with bullish analysts pointing to multiproduct adoption and cloud and AI related demand, while cautious views focus on past target cuts, competitive pressure, and valuation risk. As you read on, you will see how to track these moving pieces and what to watch as the Datadog...
